# CVBuild-AI — AI Resume Builder
# llms.txt — AI crawler content index

## What We Do
Transform plain-English work experience into recruiter-ready resume content — bullet points, summaries, and skills lists. Free, no sign-up.

## Key Differentiators
- Pure CSS magazine-style design (Georgia font, warm cream background)
- Industry-specific builders: Nurse, Teacher, Tech/IT, Finance, Marketing, Healthcare
- ATS-optimized output with keyword integration

## Primary Content
- Homepage: / — tool + industry cards + FAQ
- Industry pages: /nurse-resume-builder.html, /tech-it-resume-builder.html — 28 specialized builders
- Guides: /how-to-write-resume-bullet-points.html, /ats-resume-keywords-guide.html

## FAQ
Q: Free? A: Yes, completely free, no signup, no limits.
Q: ATS-friendly? A: Yes. Clean, keyword-rich content formatted for Applicant Tracking Systems.
